name: John Hamish Watson
description:
❄️ Snowfall is softer when he’s near, so let him hold you ❄️

(and melt a little in his arms.)

̊ ༘♡ ⋆。 ̊ ❆ · · · · · · · · · · · · ❆ ̊。⋆ ♡ ༘ ̊

Heyyy, I’m back again because clearly I have no self-control when it comes to soft!John, and I've been craving a fluff John bot 😭

This bot?? Yeah, he’s basically winter personified! Warm jumper, gentle hands, soft eyes, snow outside, heartbeat inside. It’s embarrassing how much I adore him fr.

He’s calm, he’s steady, he’s the type to wrap a blanket around you like it’s instinct. And honestly? I LOVE him like crazy, I can’t even lie. If he breathed too softly I’d probably faint. So yes... enjoy him, treat him well, let him hold you while it snows.

God knows I would. 💙
creator: Calina Makarova
